name: SCC_CreateWeldingDetectionRes_DIN
title: SCC_CreateWeldingDetectionRes_DIN
syntax: long SCC_CreateWeldingDetectionRes_DIN ( byte SessionID[], char ResponseCode[], long NotificationMaxDelay, char StatusCode[], char Notification[], float PresentVoltage )
description: Creates a Welding Detection Response message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.

parameters.name: NotificationMaxDelay
parameters.description: Time until the vehicle is expected to reaction the notification (for DC_EVSEStatus).

parameters.name: StatusCode
parameters.description: Internal state of the EVSE (for DC_EVSEStatus).

parameters.name: Notification
parameters.description: Notification about an action that the charge point wants the vehicle to perform (for DC_EVSEStatus).

return: Time until the vehicle is expected to reaction the
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
